titles.title: He Is Jehovah, God of Creation

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is Jehovah, God of creation. He is Jehovah, Lord God almighty. The Balm of Gilead, the Rock of Ages. He is Jehovah, the God that healeth thee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am the great I Am, the God of Abraham, Jehovah Shalom, the God peace I am. The God of Israel, the Everlasting One. He is Jehovah, the God that healeth thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sing hallelujah, sing hallelujah, Sing hallelujah, sing hallelujah. He is Jehovah, Lord God almighty. He is Jehovah, the God that healeth thee.

verse.name: v4
